name: carbobo
description: UK Car Health Coach + Fuel Saver

scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules shared/node_modules frontend/dist backend/dist shared/dist frontend/.vite frontend/coverage
scripts.rebuild: pnpm run clean && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter frontend dev & pnpm --filter backend dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @carbobo/shared build && pnpm --filter frontend build && pnpm --filter backend build
